decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id project_nostrand-rogers-sbs already matches the closest existing registry record (same record_id, same project: Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service). The registry record already includes this source (201110_nostrand_cb17_slides) and this local_observation_id. Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to the correct canonical record and no linking action is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service Presentation to Community Board 17
